name: esp32-matrix-tooling
description: Repo-level versioning tooling (bump/stamp/check). NOT a version source — the canonical version is the /VERSION file.

scripts.test: node scripts/check-manifest.mjs && cd mcp_server && npx tsc --project tsconfig.json && cd .. && node --test "scripts/**/*.test.js" "mcp_server/**/*.test.ts" "shared/**/*.test.js" "studio/**/*.test.js"
scripts.build:mcpb: node scripts/build-gallery-data.mjs && node scripts/copy-shared-runtime.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('mcp_server/dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && cd mcp_server && npx tsc --project tsconfig.json && cd .. && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('release',{recursive:true})" && npx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack mcp_server release/esp32-matrix.mcpb
